name: Tessie Tesla MCP Server
what_it_does: Community MCP server integrating with Tessie — a popular Tesla vehicle management API service. Enables AI agents to access Tesla vehicle data and controls via Tessie's API: battery status, charging costs, climate control, location, trip data, and financial intelligence for charging optimization. Unofficial integration via Tessie's third-party Tesla API.
use_cases: Monitoring Tesla vehicle battery status and charging from personal AI assistants
Calculating and optimizing charging costs from energy management agents
Accessing Tesla trip history and vehicle data from personal analytics agents
Managing Tesla climate control remotely from smart home automation agents
not_for: Direct Tesla Fleet API access (this uses Tessie as an intermediary)
Autonomous vehicle control (data access and basic commands only)
best_when: A Tesla owner using Tessie for vehicle management wants AI agents to access their car's data — battery levels, charging costs, trip history — and perform basic vehicle commands through natural language.
avoid_when: You want direct Tesla Fleet API access without Tessie as intermediary. Also: vehicle commands have real physical effects — test carefully before autonomous agent use.

auth.notes: Tessie API token required. Get at tessie.com — requires Tessie subscription and Tesla account.

pricing.notes: Tessie is a paid service for Tesla vehicle management. MCP server is free open source (community).

performance.rate_limits: Tessie API rate limits apply; vehicle wake-up adds latency

known_agent_gotchas: PHYSICAL EFFECTS: Vehicle commands (lock/unlock, climate, charging) have real physical effects on the car
Tesla wake-up time adds 10-30 seconds latency when car is sleeping — factor into agent timeouts
Unofficial integration via Tessie — any Tessie API changes affect this MCP; verify Tessie ToS for your use
Vehicle location data is highly privacy-sensitive — implement appropriate access controls
agent_readiness.security_notes: PHYSICAL EFFECTS: Controls a real vehicle. PRIVACY: Vehicle location data. Tessie API token auth. HTTPS. Restrict vehicle command capabilities for autonomous agent use.

security_score_components.security_notes: Physical vehicle control. Location data. Tessie API auth. Restrict commands to read-only for automated agents.
